title: ReferMe
description: ReferMe plugin idea is clever, practical, and highly useful, especially for Minecraft servers looking to grow their player base organically through referrals.
body:
# ЁЯМЯ ReferMe - Referral Rewards Plugin

**ReferMe** is a powerful and lightweight Minecraft plugin designed to reward players for bringing their friends to your server. Whether you're growing a small community or managing a large network, ReferMe encourages engagement, expands your player base, and keeps players coming back.

---
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/846746c18778395c9d7f71864f48831850ab124c_0.webp)

## тЬи Features

* ЁЯОп **Referral System**
  Players can generate unique referral codes and invite friends to join using their code.

* ЁЯТО **Reward Configurations**
  Give players custom rewards (items, currency, permissions, ranks, etc.) when someone joins using their code.

* ЁЯСе **Referral Tracking**
  Tracks how many people a player has referred, and optionally who they referred.

* ЁЯУК **Milestone Rewards**
  Reward players at specific milestones (e.g., 5, 10, 20 referrals).

* ЁЯза **Anti-Cheat System**
  Protect against abuse by preventing self-referrals and alt account exploitation.

* ЁЯкк **Referral GUI**
  Simple and interactive GUI to view codes, check referral stats, and claim rewards.

* ЁЯМР **Discord Integration**
  Sends milestone alerts via webhook to your Discord server.

* ЁЯЫая╕П **Fully Configurable**
  All messages, rewards, commands, GUI items, and settings are easily editable in the config files.

* ЁЯФМ **Hooks & Compatibility**
  Works with PlaceholderAPI, Vault, LuckPerms, and other major plugins. (coming soon)

---

## ЁЯФз Commands

```bash
/referme             # Opens the main referral GUI
/refstats            # Check your referral stats
/refermereload       # Reloads plugin config (Admin)
```

---

## ЁЯз░ Permissions

| Permission      | Description                            |
| --------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| `referme.refer` | Allows player to use referral commands |
| `referme.gui`   | Allows player to use GUI               |
| `referme.fakerefer` | Allow you to self refer or fake refer |
| `referme.stats` | Shows referral statistics and leaderboard. |
| `referme.use` | Main command for ReferMe plugin.|

---

## ЁЯУИ Ideal For:

* Survival servers
* Minigame hubs
* Factions / SMP
* Any server looking to **grow organically** through community engagement!

---
